name: ChildCareGroup - Mosaic Early Childhood Center
eligibility: Open to all families; subsidy-accepting (TWC CCS); sliding scale on some programs
notes: Flagship ChildCareGroup early-learning center co-located with the agency's North Dallas administrative office. Texas Rising Star resource center.

name: ChildCareGroup - Buckner Family Hope Center Early Learning
eligibility: Open to South Dallas families; subsidy-accepting (TWC CCS)
notes: ChildCareGroup partner site at Buckner Family Hope Center. Serves families in South Dallas / Bonton / Ideal neighborhoods.

name: ChildCareGroup Subsidy Navigation Hotline
eligibility: Dallas + Tarrant county families seeking childcare assistance
services: TWC Child Care Services (CCS) subsidy intake
notes: ChildCareGroup is the TWC contractor for the CCS subsidy in Dallas County. Phone-based intake; in-person by appointment at Pineland Drive.

name: Children's Choice Learning Centers - Casa Linda (Texas Rising Star 4-Star)
eligibility: Open to all families; subsidy-accepting (TWC CCS)
notes: Texas Rising Star 4-star quality-rated provider in East Dallas / Casa Linda. Verify current rating via texasrisingstar.org.

name: Primrose School of West Plano at Hampton Park (Texas Rising Star)
eligibility: Open to all families; some locations accept TWC CCS subsidy
notes: Texas Rising Star quality-rated; serves North Dallas / Plano commuters. Verify current TRS rating and CCS acceptance via texasrisingstar.org.

name: La Petite Academy - Garland Centerville Rd (Texas Rising Star)
eligibility: Open to all families; subsidy-accepting (TWC CCS)
notes: Texas Rising Star quality-rated provider in Garland. Verify current TRS star level via texasrisingstar.org before enrollment.

name: KinderCare at Mesquite (Texas Rising Star)
eligibility: Open to all families; subsidy-accepting (TWC CCS) at participating locations
notes: Texas Rising Star quality-rated provider serving Mesquite / east Dallas County. Confirm TRS rating and subsidy acceptance via texasrisingstar.org.

name: Bright Horizons at Dallas (Texas Rising Star)
eligibility: Open to all families; employer-sponsored slots prioritized; some subsidy slots
notes: Texas Rising Star quality-rated downtown Dallas / Uptown center. Verify TRS rating and slot availability via texasrisingstar.org.

name: Vivian Field Early Childhood Center (Dallas ISD - Texas Rising Star)
eligibility: Dallas ISD pre-K eligible families (income-qualified, English-learner, foster, military, homeless)
notes: Free Dallas ISD pre-K program for eligible 3- and 4-year-olds. Texas Rising Star quality-rated. Apply through Dallas ISD pre-K enrollment.

name: Methodist Children's Home Daycare - Waco/Dallas Region (Texas Rising Star)
address: 1112 E Red Bird Ln, Dallas, TX 75232
eligibility: Open to all families; sliding-scale fees for income-eligible
notes: Texas Rising Star quality-rated provider in southwest Dallas. Faith-based but open to all. Verify TRS rating via texasrisingstar.org.

name: Marvelous Kids Childcare (Texas Rising Star Home Provider)
eligibility: Subsidy-accepting (TWC CCS); accepts infants through school-age
notes: Texas Rising Star registered home-based provider in southern Dallas County. Address withheld per TRS home-provider listing convention; lookup current contact details and TRS rating via texasrisingstar.org provider search.

name: Texas DFPS - Child Care Licensing (Dallas Region)
eligibility: Open to all parents and providers
notes: Use the DFPS public search tool to verify a provider's license status, inspection history, and Texas Rising Star rating before enrollment.
